zh.St John Baptist Church Yard Nash Shropsh: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾納什
zh.Hill Manor, Burford Oxfordshire, England: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾布福德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert de Hill於1199年出生在英國史洛普爾納什時，他的父親Hugh de Hill23歲，母親Ewyn de Cornwall24歲。他於1220年與Lady Anne de Grousse在英國史洛普爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1264年在英國史洛普爾布福德享年65歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾納什。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert de Hill于1199年出生在英国史洛普爾納什时，他的父亲Hugh de Hill23岁，母亲Ewyn de Cornwall24岁。他于1220年与Lady Anne de Grousse在英国史洛普爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1264年在英国史洛普爾布福德享年65岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾納什。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Hill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived on or by a hill, from Middle English hill, hell, hull ‘hill’ (Old English hyll). Compare Hiller . This surname is also very common among African Americans.
English: possibly in some cases from the personal name Hille, a pet form of some name such as Hilger or Hillary .
German: from a short form of Hildebrand or any of a variety of other names, male and female, containing ancient Germanic hild ‘battle’ as the first element.

variants.name: Hillock
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived ‘(by the) small hill’, from Middle English hillok, a diminutive of hille (Old English hyll ‘hill’). See Hill .

variants.name: Hills
meanings: English: variant of Hill with genitival -s if a relationship name, attested in Matilda Hilles, 1327 (Somerset), where the genitival form may signify widowhood; or with plural -s if habitational, attested in Johanne de Hyles, 1379 (Bickerstaffe, Lancashire), and Ricardo del Hyles, 1379 (Great Eccleston, Lancashire); or, with post-medieval excrescent -s, probably the most common form.

variants.name: Hiller
meanings: German: metronymic from Hille, a pet form of the female personal name Hildegund (see Hilke ).
German: from a masculine personal beginning with the ancient Germanic element hild ‘strife, battle’.

variants.name: Hil
meanings: Dutch (Van den Hil): topographic name from hil, hul ‘hill’, particularly in the sense of a flight hill above sea level in the southwestern Netherlands.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Robert de Hill was born in 1199, in Nash, Shropshire, England, his father, Hugh de Hill, was 23 and his mother, Ewyn de Cornwall, was 24. He married Lady Anne de Grousse in 1220, in Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1264, in Burford, Shropshire, England, at the age of 65, and was buried in Nash, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert de Hill est né en 1199, à Nash, Shropshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh de Hill, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Ewyn de Cornwall, avait 24 ans. Il a épousé Lady Anne de Grousse en 1220, à Shropshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1264, à Burford, Shropshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterré à Nash, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert de Hill 1199 in Nash, Shropshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh de Hill 23 und seine Mutter Ewyn de Cornwall 24. Er hat 1220 in Shropshire, England Lady Anne de Grousse geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1264 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Burford, Shropshire, England und wurde in Nash, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Hill è nato il nel 1199 nel Nash, Shropshire, England, il suo padre, Hugh de Hill, aveva 23 anni e il suo madre, Ewyn de Cornwall, aveva 24 anni. Lui sposato Lady Anne de Grousse nel 1220, nel Shropshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1264, nel Burford, Shropshire, England, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolto a Nash, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert de Hillが1199年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアナッシュで生まれた時，父Hugh de Hillは23歳，母Ewyn de Cornwallは24歳であった。1220年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアでLady Anne de Grousseと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1264年にイギリスシュロプシュアイアブルフォードで65歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアナッシュにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert de Hill(이)가 1199년 영국 슈럽실르 나시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh de Hill(은)는 23세였고, 그의 어머니 Ewyn de Cornwall(은)는 24세였다. 그는 1220년 영국 슈럽실르에서 Lady Anne de Grousse(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1264년 영국 슈럽실르 버퍼드에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 나시에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert de Hill nasceu em 1199, em Nash, Shropshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh de Hill, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Ewyn de Cornwall, tinha 24 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Anne de Grousse em 1220, em Shropshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1264, em Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, com 65 anos, e foi sepultado em Nash, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert de Hill родился в 1199 г. в местности наш, шропшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Hugh de Hill было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Ewyn de Cornwall, 24. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Anne de Grousse в 1220 г. в местности шропшир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1264 г. в местности бурфорд, шропшир, Англия в возрасте 65 лет и был похоронен в местности наш, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert de Hill nació en 1199, en Nash, Shropshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh de Hill, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Ewyn de Cornwall, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Lady Anne de Grousse en 1220, en Shropshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1264, en Burford, Shropshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultado en Nash, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
